mapper.select: WITH session_base AS ( SELECT at.plc_id AS plcId, ah_s.history_id AS startId, ah_s.occur_time AS startTime, ( SELECT MIN(ah_e.occur_time) FROM tb_alarm_history ah_e JOIN tb_alarm_tag at_e ON at_e.tag_id = ah_e.tag_id WHERE at_e.plc_id = at.plc_id AND at_e.alarm_msg = 'Fool Proof 종료' AND ah_e.occur_time > ah_s.occur_time ) AS endTime FROM tb_alarm_history ah_s JOIN tb_alarm_tag at ON at.tag_id = ah_s.tag_id WHERE at.alarm_msg = 'Fool Proof 시작' AND ah_s.occur_time >= #{from} AND ah_s.occur_time < DATE_ADD(#{to}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) SELECT sb.plcId, sb.startId, DATE_FORMAT(sb.startTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(sb.endTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_alarm_history ah_c JOIN tb_fproof_alarm fa ON fa.tag_id = ah_c.tag_id WHERE fa.plc_id = sb.plcId AND ah_c.occur_time >= sb.startTime AND ah_c.occur_time <= COALESCE(sb.endTime, NOW()) ) AS alarmCount FROM session_base sb ORDER BY sb.startTime DESC

SELECT ah.history_id AS historyId, at.tag_name AS tagName, at.alarm_msg AS alarmMsg, DATE_FORMAT(ah.occur_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS occurTime, DATE_FORMAT(ah.clear_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS clearTime, DATE_FORMAT(ah.ack_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ackTime, ah.ack_user AS ackUser FROM tb_alarm_history ah JOIN tb_alarm_tag at ON at.tag_id = ah.tag_id JOIN tb_fproof_alarm fa ON fa.tag_id = ah.tag_id AND fa.plc_id = at.plc_id WHERE at.plc_id = #{plcId} AND ah.occur_time >= #{start} AND ah.occur_time <= #{end} ORDER BY ah.occur_time ASC
